# chronosphere_log_retention_config (Resource)

A retention policy dictating how long logs matching a given filter are kept before being deleted.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `filter` (String) Log query filter. The retention policy applies only to logs that match.
- `mode` (String) Mode that determines how matching logs are retained in long-term (Iceberg) storage.
- `name` (String) Display name of the log retention config.
- `retention_days` (Number) Number of days to retain matching logs in long-term (Iceberg) storage after they are exported. When multiple configs overlap, the longest retention wins.

### Optional

- `slug` (String) Stable identifier for the log retention config. Generated from `name` if omitted. Immutable after creation.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
